policy: no temporary fake fallback objects for original TC4 renderer-driven systems
rules: Do not use cube_all for non-cube TC4 objects.
Do not use item/generated or flat 2D model for systems that were custom rendered in TC4.
Do not invent textures when original textures exist in the source jar.
Do not mass-add objects without per-object parity decision.
Every converted object must state original intent, current implementation and remaining gaps.
implemented: WandItemRenderer custom renderer using original TC4 rod/cap model textures
Wand item models now builtin/entity instead of item/generated/handheld/layered placeholders
remaining_gaps: Renderer is architecturally correct for 1.19.2 but still not exact TC4 OpenGL render math.
Need exact TC4 vis cost modifiers across all rods/caps.
Need wand crafting table GUI parity.
